text: Rishtey wale bina haan bole chale gaye aur Mummy ne rona shuru kar diya ki meri wajah se Sharma ji ki beti ke samne hamari izzat mitti mein mil gayi. Mera dimaag ekdum sunn ho gaya hai aur bas rona aa raha hai, samajh nahi aa raha ki kal ke exam ke liye kaise padhun. Itni zyada ghabrahat ho rahi hai ki lag raha hai saans hi ruk jayegi, padhai toh bahut door ki baat hai.

Ladki walo ke jane ke baad Papa ne sabke samne taana maara ki main Sharma ji ki ladki jaisi 'homely' nahi hoon isliye reject ho gayi. Main itni toot chuki hoon ki bas bistar par padi hoon, na kuch sujhayi de raha hai na koi umeed dikh rahi hai. Dimag mein bas wahi baatein ghoom rahi hain ki main ek bojh hoon, abhi career ya solutions ke baare mein sochne ki himmat hi nahi hai.

Aaj ki rejection ke baad Mummy keh rahi hain ki 'log kya kahenge' ki beti ki umar nikli ja rahi hai aur koi pasand nahi kar raha. Mera gala rone se bhara hua hai aur flood of emotions ki wajah se main unhe ye bhi nahi bol pa rahi ki mujhe abhi aur padhna hai. Bas akele baith kar siskiyaan nikal rahi hain, aage ka plan kya hoga ye toh dimaag mein aa hi nahi raha.

Papa ne rishta party ke samne meri padhai ko lekar jhoot bola par phir bhi unhone mana kar diya, ab wo sara gussa mujh par nikal rahe hain. Mera dimaag kaam karna band kar gaya hai, bas ek ajeeb sa andhera lag raha hai aur rone ke alawa kuch karne ki himmat nahi hai. Itne saare emotions ek saath aa rahe hain ki main apni online classes ya notes ke baare mein bilkul blank hoon.

Rishtey walo ne mere 'restricted mobility' aur college jane par sawal uthaye aur mere jane ke baad ghar mein kalesh shuru ho gaya. Main itni zyada overwhelm ho gaya hoon ki bas rona nikal raha hai aur lag raha hai ki sab meri galati hai. Solution kya hoga ye toh chhodo, mujhe toh bas is waqt rone ke liye ek kona chahiye jahan koi mujhe Sharma ji ki beti se compare na kare.
